primary_contract: nwau_py.emergency_transition_registry metadata-only transition registry for UDG, AECC, pricing-year applicability, acceptance state, and emergency-stream compatibility
licensing_caveats: Do not embed or redistribute licensed UDG, AECC, or grouper tables unless the relevant source license explicitly permits it.
Any local mapping tables, grouped outputs, or user-supplied reference artifacts remain outside the repository unless they are synthetic or otherwise redistributable.
This registry records licensing boundaries and workflow references only; it does not satisfy the user's own licensing obligations.
description: Document and validate emergency classification transition registry semantics for UDG and AECC versions, pricing-year applicability, stream compatibility, source licensing caveats, and no-invented-crosswalk boundaries.
